prompt: Add a Docker Python lab to docs/intermediate/22-lists-docker.md that teaches list operations. Include three labs: one showing how to create and print a list, one showing append/remove, and one showing list comprehensions. Make sure the shared CSS and JS are wired up in mkdocs.yml.

assertions.description: File contains exactly three docker lab divs with suffixes 1, 2, and 3
Every lab has docker-lab-N, docker-code-N, docker-editor-N, docker-buttons-N, docker-run-N, docker-reset-N, docker-output-N for N in 1,2,3
Run buttons use runDocker('N') and Reset buttons use resetDocker('N') with matching suffix
Page includes instruction to run bash scripts/run-python-docker.sh before using labs
Page does not contain <style> or <script> blocks — all styling/logic comes from shared files
